array.string:
export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"
CONFIG_REPO="$HOME/src/openclaw-config" LOG="$HOME/.openclaw/health-check-cron.log" PROMPT_FILE="$CONFIG_REPO/devops/health-check.md"
mkdir -p /tmp/openclaw
if [ ! -f "$PROMPT_FILE" ]; then echo "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) [$(hostname -s)] ERROR: health-check.md not found at $PROMPT_FILE" >> "$LOG" exit 1 fi
cd "$CONFIG_REPO" || exit 1
echo "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) [$(hostname -s)] health check starting" >> "$LOG"
CLAUDE_EXIT=0 "$HOME/.local/bin/claude" --print --dangerously-skip-permissions --max-turns 25 \ -p "$(cat "$PROMPT_FILE")" >> "$LOG" 2>&1 || CLAUDE_EXIT=$?
echo "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) [$(hostname -s)] health check done (exit $CLAUDE_EXIT)" >> "$LOG" exit $CLAUDE_EXIT
